title: Ensure all AppArmor Profiles are enforcing

prose.en: Ensure all AppArmor Profiles are enforcing

description.en: AppArmor profiles define what resources applications are able to access.

rationale.en: Security configuration requirements vary from site to site. Some sites may mandate a policy that is stricter than the default policy, which is perfectly acceptable. This item is intended to ensure that any policies that exist on the system are activated.

audit.en:
Run the following command to set all profiles to enforce mode:  

**Note:** Any unconfined processes may need to have a profile created or activated for them and then be restarted

```
# aa-enforce /etc/apparmor.d/*
```

remediation.en:
Run the following command to set all profiles to enforce mode:  

**Note:** Any unconfined processes may need to have a profile created or activated for them and then be restarted

```
# aa-enforce /etc/apparmor.d/*
```
